activities.name: 2x800 + 6x400
activities.description: Supposed to be doing 4x800. Hope to work up to that.

activities.name: Supposedly easy
activities.description: First two miles felt easy… but overheated as usual in mile 3. But still longest run without a walk.

activities.name: Dayton loop on a warm morning
activities.description: Stopped 3 times to cool down, but was still a soggy yeti at the end. Looks like it will be another week before the mornings cool down around here.

activities.name: Short run; good run
activities.description: Good distance for me when it’s in the 60s.

activities.name: There’s nothing wrong with getting a little lost
activities.description: Deliciously cool and rainy Sydney morning.

activities.name: Treadmill: 1km intervals
activities.description: Starting from 10:30 pace. Finishing at 8:30 pace

activities.name: To the Gibberagong Track and Back
activities.description: Getting slower and slower, but it’s a beautiful morning, so whatever.

activities.name: Lane Cove National Park
activities.description: And a visit with the Turra-Champions afterwards

activities.name: The Gibbaragong track: split personality
activities.description: Wide and flat at the top, then a precipitous drop down to the creek. Doubtless much more fun on the remainder of the trail to Bobbin Head but that would have meant a knee deep creek crossing which I was not up for this morning.

activities.name: Back home to the shady snake
Quick one before an airport run
Truncated calibration run
activities.description: Got gaslit by my watch which told me I was way behind the pace… but actually I was only a little behind. Yes — I need to pay less attention to that little bugger.

activities.name: September Calibration run
activities.description: Happy to see I’m still improving a little.

activities.name: It’s getting 🆒 in the mornings
activities.description: Hooray for 53F! First 3 miles felt good then I stopped a few times in the final mile. Not bad.

activities.name: Track work is better with friends
activities.description: Mintu accompanied me on 4x800, and Martha, Tamara, and Wendy were all there too. No photos unfortunately.

activities.name: Better again. It’s been a great week so far.
activities.description: At this rate I’m going to have to stop whining about my slow recovery pretty soon!

activities.name: Easy with 30 second pickups
activities.description: [strava://athletes/385803/11]Mino Giunta prescribed these for me about 6 months ago, and [strava://athletes/35557616/14]Tom Richardson also recommends them. Eventually I get the message. Every half mile I did 30 seconds at full speed followed by a minute of walking.

activities.name: Short and sweet with Expect Delays
